title: Thats Whats Missing
description: It adds Missing Blocks! That can make your World prettier!
body:
This Mod add **Thats Whats Missing** in Minecraft!

Basicaly new Stairs/Slabs/Walls for these Blocks:

- **Calcite**
- **Smooth Calcite**
- **Basalt**
- **Smooth Basalt**
- **Polsihed Basalt**

The Blocks can only be made through a **Stone Cutter**!

Taking suggestions in the Discord for more blocks!

[![Invite to Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba2323f25b7192e1a33479b703934f9532769a0.png)](https://discord.com/invite/e5C2MUBndf)




![The Missing Blocks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7bad82ead759ce1f459c67cefdccfafd0b5b4f7.png)
